titleStmt.title: SII 18.118: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 118. (B.K. Nos. 153 and 154 of 1933-34.) BIJAPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription in Sanskrit language and Kannaḍa characters is dated in Śaka 1043, Plava, Mārgaśīrsha śu. Paṁchamī, corresponding to A.D. 1121, November 16, Wednesday.

On this day which was his birthday, Gōvinda-Daṇḍādhipa made a gift of 370 nishkas for the purpose of worshipping the gods Brahmā, Vishṇu and Īs11vara in the agrahāra Pauṭhage (modern Sāloṭgi), and also for feeding the visitors to the place on the birthday of the donor every year. Gōvīnda-Daṇḍādhipa was the sister's son of Anantapāla, the famous general of the Chālukya king Vikramāditya.

Below this record is engraved in Kannaḍa another grant of money made by the same donor, for the purpose of feeding annually the assembly of Āndhradaṇḍa on the Pūrṇimā of Māgha, which was the anniversary of the death of his daughter-in-law Padmāvati. This record is numbered as B.K. No. 154 of 1933-34.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti . śriyamurasi dadhānō dēvatānāṁ nidhā
naṁ suraripuri purasti svastidhāmā tridhāmā
jayati jaṭharajātaṁ yasya tadvārijātaṁ bhuva
nabhavanatakṣṇaḥ karmmaśālēva dhātuḥ . tasmādajō
jani jagajjanakaḥ śrutīnāmēkō nidhirmmanasi tasya
sa kaśyapōbhūt sarvvaprajāpatipatiryyata vi
tadāsīdbhūyassurāsuranarādhijagatsamastaṁ .
lakṣmījanmagrihā guṇōjvalamaṇikṣētrāḥ suvi
dyānadīnāthāḥ kīrttisudhārasōdayabhuvassau
janyacaṁdrōdayāḥ bibhrāṇāssatataṁ mahatva
matuḷaṁ maryyādayā sadvijaśrēṣṭhā vāridhayō
yathā samudagustatkaśyapasyānvayē . vaṁśātta
tō gaṇapatirnnijavaṁśakarttā bharttā yathā gaṇapatiḥ
pramathavrajasya vaṁśōnnatassatatadānajalārdraha
stastasmātsutōtha samajāyata padmanābhaḥ . viḷasa
dubhayapakṣaḥ sadvijānāmadhīśaḥ satata budhasu
sēbyaḥ sakṣamābhṛdguruśca dvijapatigurutējaḥ puṣṭi
kētuḥ sa bhāsvān dhritabahuguṇaratnaḥ padmanā
bhaḥ kavīṁdraḥ . vasudēvādiva kṛṣṇaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ śrīpa
dmanābhatassamabhūt dadhadapi kṛṣṇatvamasau svacchā
yūnirmmalīkṛtadigantaḥ . satyānuraktyā saviśēṣa
yuktyā sannandanatvēna ca satvavṛtyā . yaśōdayā
saṁbhṛtamaṁgaḷatvātkṛṣṇasya tasyānukarōti kṛṣṇaḥ .
śrīmadbharadvājakulaprasūtērmmahēśadaṇḍādhi
patēssutōbhūt Anaṁtapāḷō budhavṛṁdapāḷaḥ
sākṣāddharāyūmiha dharmmamūrttiḥ . hatvā hi
raṇyakaśipuṁ vibudhādhipāya dattāndharitrīṁ jaga
tāmadhīśaḥ yathā nṛsiṁhaḥ paripāti dēvōhyanaṁ
tadaṇḍādhipatistathaiva . gāṁbhīryyavṛttēna mahā
sthirēṇa tapōbhṛtā satyavatā sahaiva Aṁbhōdhayō
ṣṭau girayō munīṁdrāścāsaṁjagaṁti dviyudhiṣṭhi
rāṇi . padmāṁ tatsahajāṁ guṇōjvalamaṇivrāta
prabhāḷankṛtāṁ dēvīṁ dēvapatiśśacīmiva mahā
dēvō yathā pārvvatīṁ sītāṁ rāma Iva śriyaṁ
haririva śrīnaṁdanō vā ratiṁ satyāṁ kṛṣṇa Ivōḍha
vānguṇanidhistāṁ kṛṣṇadaṁḍādhipaḥ . Akṣōbhyānu
dadhīnivāpratihatān bāhūniva śrīpatērvvē
dāḍhyāṁścaturaḥ pravartitavṛṣānalabhatsa tasyāṁ
sutān .
śrīmaṁlakṣmaṇadaṇḍanāyakama
thō gōviṁdadaṇḍādhipaṁ paścānmallacamūpa
tiṁ gaṇapatiṁcētyāśritānnandanānu .
śriṁgārē sūtradhārassakalakavikalā
grāmaviśrāmabhūmirvvīrasyā
dyāvatāraḥ śrutavinayanayācā
rabhūmyaikasīmāvajraṁ dharmmasya varmma
pravarakavivarairvaṁdyamānō vacō
bhistēṣāṁ gōviṁdarājastṛjagati viditō dā
nasaṁtānabhājāṁ . Asti kaścijjanapadasta
rddavāḍīti viśrutaḥ yadgrāmā bahi
raṁtaśca nānārāmōpaśōbhitāḥ ta
tra dharmmasya vidyānāṁ sthānaṁ pauṭhage Itya
bhūt . Agrahārassūrikīrṇnassa
hārāmō manōharaḥ . brahmaviṣṇuma
hēśānāṁ śālā tatrātiśālinī mērōḥ
prītiṁ parityajya yatra sākṣādvasaṁ
ti tē . gaṇitēṣu śakābdēṣu rāmavēdāṁ
barēndubhiḥ saṁvatparē plavē tatra śrīgōviṁ
dacamūpatiḥ . śālāniviṣṭadvijava
ryyahastē saptatyupētaṁ triśataṁ nidhā
ya niṣkān catussaptatimētadutthā
nvarṣātsa dharmmārtthamadādvibhajya . Utsaṁ
khyānānivāryyāgatabahujanatā
bhōjanārtthaṁ prasannaḥ paṁcamyā
mujvalāyāṁ nijajananatithau mārgga
śīrṣēnuvarṣaṁ niṣkānṣaṣṭiṁ tu rātrau tri
jagadadhikṛtāṁ brahmaviṣṇvīśvarāṇāṁ nai
vēdyāya pradātuṁ sakalaguṇa
yutāṁ maṁḍakāṁ kṣīrayuktāṁ gōvindō
daṁḍanāthastribhuvanabhavanatrāṇa
samhārabhājāṁ tēṣāṁ niṣkāndasāsau pratiRead daśāsau
dinamadadādbhaktiyuktastadartthaṁ prā
dātsa caturō niṣkān śāṁ
tivārē dvijanmanāṁ tāṁbūlārtthama
tiprītyā yāvatsūrysōṁdu
tārakaṁ yēnaiva mārggēṇa mayā
prapannastēnaiva yē pāṁti madīya
dharmmaṁ saṁti dvijā mūrdhni tadīyapā
dān gōviṁdarājōhamamūnvahāmi .
mattaṁ gōvindarasadaṁḍanāyakaru
tamma sose padmāvatiya svarggadivasaṁ
māghada puṇnameyalu varṣaṁprati
yāyabbege śrēyassappaṁtāgi yā
ṁdhradaṁḍada parṣega bhōjanavaṁ mārppaṁ
tu koṭṭa jagadaḻaṁ gadyāṇa 25
Digital edition of SII 18.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
